name: draw_answer
description: Draw a short answer to the screen as a list of lines. Do not compute any coordinates or SVG yourself — just provide the text content, one entry per line, in the order they should appear top to bottom. The app lays them out for you.

lines.description: The answer as a list of lines, top to bottom. Each entry is one line of plain text. Up to 8 lines, keep each to at most 26 characters. Beyond 8 lines (up to 14 total) the app switches to a smaller font, so keep each line to at most 32 characters. Prefix bullet lines with '- '. Do not include markdown, coordinates, or styling.
